response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff Software Engineer with strong distributed systems and polyglot programming expertise, but he lacks the executive leadership, engineering management scale (10 to 30+ headcount), and deep production multi-agent AI architecture experience required for this CTO role. His background heavily aligns with hands-on individual contributor roles rather than strategic, venture-backed executive leadership.
strengths: Deep hands-on backend and distributed systems experience, including microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Some fintech domain exposure from his time at RIDE Capital reshaping investment practices.
concerns: Zero executive or senior engineering management experience; no track record of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers.
Lacks deep, production-grade architectural experience with complex multi-agent LLM systems in high-stakes financial environments.
Profile is strictly that of a hands-on individual contributor and software craftsman, rather than a strategic CTO.
